abilities.name: Eldritch Summoning
abilities.description: Shortly after dying, a burst of magic damage is dealth to all enemies in a small area. This ability is less effective on creeps. The unit instant kills itself when it reaches its chased target. Eldritch Explosion procs cannot further spawn Minor Imps. Increases Eldritch Explosion's current and max ability level.

abilities.name: Fatal Bonds
abilities.description: Binds several enemy units together, causing a portion of the damage taken to one of them to be felt by the others.

abilities.name: Shadow Word
abilities.description: Heals allied units and damages enemy units within the radius over time.

abilities.name: Upheaval
abilities.description: As Warlock channels up to a certain time, Upheaval reaches its max power and its ability values no longer increases. All ability values stop increasing at the last 0.1-second of the channeling. Creates uncontrollable Minor Imps of the current Eldritch Summoning ability level per certain Upheaval channeling interval.

abilities.name: Chaotic Offering
abilities.description: The conjured Golem is partially immune to movement speed slow sources. Passively summons a Golem of its corresponding level on Warlock's death location, excluding Reincarnation sources.
